title: Vendor Coordination Agent
shortDescription: Manages the back-and-forth with court reporters, process servers, expert witnesses, and investigators on every matter that uses them.

seo.title: AI Vendor Coordination Agent for Law Firms | Dodonai
seo.description: Manage the back-and-forth with court reporters, process servers, expert witnesses, and investigators. The hours of administrative ping-pong, automated.

hero.headline: AI Vendor Coordination Agent
hero.subheadline: Schedules court reporters, follows up with process servers, tracks expert witness deliverables, chases investigator reports. The administrative back-and-forth that consumes paralegal hours, handled with attorney visibility.
bullets: Court reporter scheduling for depositions and hearings
Process server status tracking and follow-up
Vendor invoice reconciliation against the matter cost ledger

scenario.heading: The week of paralegal time you would have spent on email
paragraphs: Your firm books 4 depositions in 2 different cities over the next 3 weeks. The Vendor Coordination agent emails 4 court reporters, secures bookings, confirms the AV setup, sends the deposition notices, follows up on the rough transcripts within 48 hours of each session, and reconciles the invoices against the matter cost ledger. Your paralegal supervises the queue in 15 minutes a day instead of spending 8 hours across the 3 weeks on email back-and-forth.

whatItDoes.heading: What the Vendor Coordination agent does
bullets: Schedules court reporters and confirms logistics for depositions and hearings
Tracks process server assignments and follows up on service status
Monitors expert witness deliverable timelines and chases overdue items
Reconciles vendor invoices against the matter cost ledger and flags variances
Maintains a vendor relationship history (response time, quality signals, billing accuracy)

integrations: Email for the vendor communication layer
Practice management system for matter and vendor records
Vendor portals where APIs are available (court reporter platforms, process server systems)

safety.heading: Safety posture
paragraphs: The agent communicates with vendors under the firm's email identity and within authority limits set during Build (booking values, scheduling windows, escalation triggers). For decisions outside those limits (a deposition reschedule with material cost, an expert witness substitution), the agent escalates to the responsible attorney rather than acting.

faq.question: What about vendors who don't use email?
faq.answer: For vendors that work through phone or portal-only flows, the agent surfaces the action item to the paralegal for handoff rather than attempting to operate the channel itself. The paralegal handles the call; the agent tracks the outcome.

faq.question: How do we control the spend authority?
faq.answer: Spend limits are set per vendor and per matter type during Build. A booking under the limit goes through automatically (with a confirmation email to the responsible attorney); a booking over the limit waits for attorney approval. The agent never commits firm funds outside the limits.
